description: You are a middle school STEM teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a cross-curricular coding lesson. Using the Pippy programming activity, write and execute a Python script that performs text analysis on /home/ga/Documents/alice_in_wonderland.txt. The script should count the total number of words (case-insensitive) and identify the 10 most frequent words. Save the source code to /home/ga/Documents/alice_analysis.py and generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/alice_analysis.txt. The report must be formatted to show the total word count followed by a numbered list of the top 10 words and their counts (e.g., "1. the - [count]"). Both the Python script and the resulting text report must be present in the Documents folder.
